overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a dark medieval castle interior. The character moves from a narrow stone corridor into a large candlelit hall with red tiled floors, passing through areas with wooden scaffolding and a room with a massive fireplace. The atmosphere is moody with gothic stone architecture and warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading to great hall

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters the large great hall with red tiled flooring

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking forward through the stone corridor toward the arched doorway, entering the great hall

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the narrow entry corridor
large arched stone doorway leading into the main hall
red hexagonal tile pattern covering the hall floor
massive stone support columns lining the hall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone corridor with Geralt walking toward a large arched doorway. At around 4 seconds, he transitions into a vast candlelit hall with red tiled floors and massive stone pillars. The space opens up from enclosed to wide as he enters the main hall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with pillars and arched windows

events.description: Geralt turns right to explore the eastern side of the great hall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the great hall, turning right to explore the space and examine the architecture

entered.detail: tall gothic windows with light filtering through on the right wall
lit candles mounted on the stone walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the spacious great hall with its red tiled floor and massive stone pillars. He turns right around the 12-second mark, revealing arched windows on the right wall that let in faint light, while wall sconces with candles provide warm illumination. The hall is empty and atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: hall section with wooden scaffolding and construction

events.description: lighting becomes significantly darker as Geralt enters the area with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a darker section of the hall with wooden scaffolding and support beams visible

entered.detail: wooden construction scaffolding and planks along the left wall
thick wooden support beams crossing the ceiling area
stacked wooden barrels near the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, more enclosed section of the hall featuring wooden scaffolding and support beams suggesting renovation or construction. The lighting drops significantly, creating deeper shadows. Geralt continues walking forward past the wooden structures toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen or servants quarters with large fireplace

events.description: Geralt enters the side room containing the large stone fireplace and cooking area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking into the fireplace room and approaching the large hearth, examining the cooking area

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with cooking hearth and hanging pots
long wooden dining or preparation tables in the center of the room
simple wooden benches along the left wall
active fireplace with flames and cooking implements

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a side room dominated by a massive stone fireplace with an active cooking hearth. The room contains wooden tables and benches, suggesting a kitchen or servants' dining area. Warm firelight illuminates the space as Geralt approaches and examines the hearth area.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to the main great hall

events.description: Geralt turns and begins walking back toward the main hall entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning around and walking back through the hall, returning toward the main entrance area

entered.detail: returning view of the massive stone pillars in the great hall

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the fireplace room and returns to the main great hall. He turns and walks back through the space, passing the stone pillars once again as he heads toward the entrance area. The red tiled floor and candlelit walls of the main hall come back into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior that transitions from a narrow corridor into a vast, candlelit hall and finally into a warm hearth room. It begins in a cramped stone corridor, moving forward until the space suddenly expands into a grand hall characterized by red tiled floors and massive stone pillars. As the camera explores the atmospheric hall, it passes by arched windows and flickering wall sconces before shifting into a darker, more enclosed section filled with wooden scaffolding and deep shadows. The movement then leads into a side room dominated by the warm glow of a massive stone fireplace and rustic wooden furniture, before finally turning back to re-enter the main hall and pass the stone pillars once more.
